introSection: Boderitt is a Wiegand Mystical Hex suspended roller coaster located at Erlebniswelt Seilbahnen Thale in Thale, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. The coaster opened in June 2015.
fullText: Boderitt is a Wiegand Mystical Hex suspended roller coaster located at Erlebniswelt Seilbahnen Thale in Thale, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. The coaster opened in June 2015.
